  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:        (Branch: RELENG_6)

  Log:
  MFC r1.5 so C++ programs will work in 6.2.  Thanks for the fix, Bruce.
  
  Moved __BEGIN_DECLS up a little so that it covers __test_sse() and C++
  isn't broken,
  
  PR:             104425
  Approved by:    re (bmah)
